title: Department of Forecasting

frontmatter.title: Department of Forecasting
frontmatter.description: Demand and capacity forecasting — projecting future load and headroom from historical telemetry under real-world uncertainty.

body:
# Department of Forecasting

The forward-looking department. Agents learn to turn observed history into defensible projections of
demand and capacity, quantifying uncertainty rather than hiding it.

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [NETINT-220](courses/netint-220.md) | Demand Forecasting | Core | 4 | NETINT-101 |

Part of the [School of Network Intelligence](../../index.md).
